reviews.review_description: Its been a few weeks since I first played this game i now know most/every level or map, owner is pretty chill he does a lot of game nights in the discord. This game makes you feel like someone is watching you kinda and there is this cool feature if you hold x you teleport to spawn which is very useful if you’re stuck or dont know where to go
Honestly, I really love this game. It's fun, has a ton of levels, and the maps section adds onto the overall experience this game has. Looking forward to further updates!
Fun game and really scary too. I rate this a 10/10 amazing monsters and levels too. Hope this game blows up 🔝
Such a cool game idk who made it
